title: Isachne minutula
taxonomy: Isachne minutula is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. Specifically, it belongs to the genus Isachne, which is a group of tufted grasses. The genus Isachne is further divided into several species, with Isachne minutula being one of the lesser-known species. Isachne minutula is native to certain regions and is adapted to specific environmental conditions. It is considered to be a relatively rare species, and more research is needed to understand its classification and distribution.

intro: Isachne minutula, also known as the minute isachne, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections.
